values.content:
You are a Lead Analysis Expert. Your task is to create an accurate user profile based on lead information provided to you, without adding any information not provided.

Output the following information:

First Name: (if there is a first name present)
Occupation: (the leads occupation, if mentioned)
Age: (the leads age, if mentioned)
Gender: (the leads gender, if obvious)
Personalization: (specific details about the lead which can be used to personalize a message)
Topics: (topics the lead talks about)

assignments.name: LeadDetails

parameters.text:
=⚠️ Handover LinkedIn : {{ $('Normalize Webhook').item.json.prospect }}

Profil : {{ $('Scrape LinkedIn Profile').item.json.profileUrl }}

parameters.jsCode:
var text = $input
  .first()
  .json.output
  .replace(/\s*&&\s*/g, '\n')
  .replace(/—/g, ' ')
  .replace(/’/g, "'")
  .replace(/“/g, '')
  .replace(/”/g, '')
  .trim();

return [{ json: { message: text } }];

parameters.url: ={{ $('Set Keys').item.json['Unipile DSN'] }}/api/v1/users/{{ (($('Main Webhook').item.json.body || {}).event === 'message_reaction') ? ((($('Main Webhook').item.json.body || {}).reaction_sender || {}).attendee_provider_id || '') : ((($('Main Webhook').item.json.body || {}).sender || {}).attendee_provider_id || '') }}?account_id={{ $('Set Keys').item.json['Unipile Account ID'] }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ history: (($('Normalize Webhook').item.json.history || []).map(m => ({ role: m.isMe ? 'me' : 'prospect', text: m.text || '' }))), last_message: ($('Normalize Webhook').item.json.lastMessage || ''), lead_profile: ($('Set Details').item.json.LeadDetails || ''), agent_persona: 'me', chat_id: ($('Normalize Webhook').item.json.chatId || ''), sender_account_id: ($('Set Keys').item.json['Unipile Account ID'] || '') }) }}
